summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Simplifii iteration 3 features. All new features working correctly: University Selector onboarding (40 Australian unis with 8 Go8), Multi-Mode Output Engine (5 modes: Structured, Visual/MindMap, Simplified, Deep Academic, Interactive), VoiceMode integration (browser TTS), Translation widget (10 languages), Hidden Curriculum Decoder page, Executive Function Planner (Pomodoro timer 25:00 + cognitive load tracker), .ics calendar export for Course Planner.

minor.issue: React Flow warning about nodeTypes/edgeTypes object recreation - should be memoized

passed_tests: Dashboard shows 8 tool cards (6 original + Hidden Curriculum Decoder + Executive Planner)
Navigation bar shows 8 nav links including Decoder and Planner
Onboarding page step 2 shows neurotype selector with 5 options (ADHD, Dyslexic, Autistic, Anxious, Multiple)
Hidden Curriculum Decoder (/hidden-curriculum) page loads with text input and Decode Jargon button
Executive Function Planner (/executive-planner) page loads with Pomodoro timer (25:00), task list, cognitive load tracker
Executive Planner: can add tasks, toggle tasks, Pomodoro start/pause/reset buttons work
Results page: 5 output modes available (Structured, Visual, Simplified, Deep Academic, Interactive)
Results page: Voice button toggles voice widget
Results page: Translate button opens translation panel with 10 languages
Results page: Start New Brief button exists
Results page: Visual mode shows MindMap view with ReactFlow
Backend /api/decode-jargon POST works (returns decodedTerms, hiddenExpectations, actionSummary)
Backend /api/translate POST works (tested with Chinese Simplified)
Backend /api/course-planner/export-ics POST works (returns valid ICS format)
Course Planner page: file upload zone and Create Course Plan button present
critical_code_review_comments: MindMapView component should memoize nodeTypes/edgeTypes to avoid React Flow warning
VoiceMode uses browser SpeechSynthesis API correctly - no backend call needed
Executive Planner correctly saves tasks to localStorage
Cognitive Load tracker correctly calculates load based on active (non-completed) tasks
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Existing brief 'Marketing Strategy Essay' (brief_037c011a6fe7) used for Results page testing

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check bypassed for owner testing - payments still create real Stripe checkout sessions

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features verified working. Test user has university set to 'University of Sydney' and neurotype set to 'adhd'. Existing brief 'Marketing Strategy Essay' available for Results page testing. VoiceMode uses browser SpeechSynthesis API. MindMapView uses reactflow library. Executive Planner saves tasks to localStorage. The onboarding flow skips to step 2 (neurotype) if user already has university set.

university_selector.details: 40 universities returned, 8 Go8 featured, search bar present, skip button present

multi_mode_output.details: 5 modes available: Structured, Visual (MindMap), Simplified, Deep Academic, Interactive

voice_mode.details: Voice button toggles widget, uses browser SpeechSynthesis API

translation_widget.details: 10 languages available, translation panel opens, backend endpoint works

hidden_curriculum_decoder.details: Page loads, text input present, Decode Jargon button works, returns decoded terms

executive_function_planner.details: Pomodoro timer (25:00), start/pause/reset buttons, task list, cognitive load tracker
